node.name: TABLE UI THEMES
node.rich_text:
Table.UI.Themes
I’ll refine the coding system to be more structured and meaningful by assigning numbers based on thematic categories and keyword relevance.
Here’s the improved system: - **First Letter(s):** Abbreviation of the theme name. - **First Digit:** Thematic category (e.g., Sci-Fi = 1, Fantasy = 2, Hybrid = 3, Nature = 4). - **Second Digit:** Design style (e.g., Ornate = 1, Minimalist = 2, Cybernetic = 3, Arcane = 4). - **Third & Fourth Digits:** Derived from keyword significance (e.g., generated from weighted importance of core keywords).
| Full Code | Type | Code Prefix | Name | Code Identifier | Keywords | | UI-CAF-1327 | UI | CAF | Cyber-Arcane Fusion | 1327 | neon, mystical glyphs, holographic, runes, glowing circuits | | UI-CEL-2438 | UI | CEL | Celestial Interface | 2438 | stardust, cosmic, planetary, orbit, ethereal glow | | UI-BIO-3516 | UI | BIO | Bio-Mechanical UI | 3516 | organic tech, metallic veins, biotech, pulsating energy | | UI-ARI-4319 | UI | ARI | Ancient Relic Interface | 4319 | weathered artifacts, enchanted runes, mystical engravings | | UI-HOS-1542 | UI | HOS | Holographic Spectrum | 1542 | transparent panels, prism reflections, interactive light | | UI-SPM-5441 | UI | SPM | Shadow-Punk Mysticism | 5441 | occult engravings, supernatural glow, dark tech | | UI-VTI-1618 | UI | VTI | Void-Tech Interface | 1618 | gravity distortion, dark matter, deep space aesthetics | | UI-EXE-3625 | UI | EXE | Exotic Ethereal | 3625 | liquid energy, celestial patterns, flowing UI | | UI-SPU-4728 | UI | SPU | Solar-Powered UI | 4728 | radiant panels, golden glow, energy cores | | UI-NEC-1829 | UI | NEC | Nebula Circuitry | 1829 | nebula swirls, galactic wiring, vibrant energy hubs | | UI-FAU-3146 | UI | FAU | Fractal Architecture UI | 3146 | recursive patterns, infinite scaling, dynamic hierarchy | | UI-EPI-5234 | UI | EPI | Echo-Pulse Interface | 5234 | soundwave visuals, rhythmic UI motion, energy vibrations | | UI-CTD-2527 | UI | CTD | Chrono-Tech Design | 2527 | time-loop aesthetics, glowing hourglass panels, ancient circuits | | UI-PMU-3418 | UI | PMU | Psionic Matrix UI | 3418 | psychic waves, mental energy flow, neon psionics | | UI-GCU-4523 | UI | GCU | Glass-Crystal UI | 4523 | sharp crystalline panels, refracted light effects, smooth transparency | | UI-QRI-1617 | UI | QRI | Quantum Rift Interface | 1617 | warped spacetime visuals, quantum pulses, multiverse integration | | UI-MGU-4412 | UI | MGU | Mystic Glyph UI | 4412 | arcane symbols, forgotten magic, glowing inscriptions | | UI-LNI-2639 | UI | LNI | Lunar Nexus Interface | 2639 | moonlit design, soft luminescence, celestial layering | | UI-OCU-5841 | UI | OCU | Oceanic Cyber UI | 5841 | deep-sea holograms, underwater currents, bioluminescent buttons | | UI-ESI-4726 | UI | ESI | Eclipse Shadow UI | 4726 | solar eclipse contrast, dark gradient layering, mystic obscurity | | UI-IMU-5317 | UI | IMU | Infernal Mechanism UI | 5317 | molten metal, fiery engravings, obsidian control panels | | UI-FTI-2514 | UI | FTI | Frost-Tech Interface | 2514 | frozen circuitry, crystalline frost panels, chilling blue glow | | UI-AGI-1628 | UI | AGI | Astral Gateway UI | 1628 | portal-like elements, cosmic doorways, infinite depth visuals | | UI-TMU-3149 | UI | TMU | Tesseract Matrix UI | 3149 | multi-dimensional layering, geometric depth, seamless perspective shifts | | UI-PCU-1637 | UI | PCU | Plasma Core UI | 1637 | energy conduits, charged nodes, pulse-driven components | | UI-ESU-4325 | UI | ESU | Elemental Spectrum UI | 4325 | fire, water, air, earth themes, dynamic transformations | | UI-ECU-5318 | UI | ECU | Etherial Cyber UI | 5318 | futuristic spiritual essence, translucent waves, mystic overlays | | UI-RDU-2734 | UI | RDU | Rift-Dimensional UI | 2734 | portal interfaces, interdimensional energy fluctuations | | UI-OOU-1639 | UI | OOU | Omniscient Observatory UI | 1639 | cosmic observatory-inspired controls, deep space scans | | UI-RTU-4723 | UI | RTU | Radiant Tapestry UI | 4723 | energy weaves, cosmic threads, luminous waves | | UI-TVI-3628 | UI | TVI | Techno-Vine Interface | 3628 | digital flora, creeping circuit vines, organic digital evolution | | UI-AFU-4417 | UI | AFU | Arcane Forge UI | 4417 | enchanted workshop, mystical machinery, glowing alchemy nodes | | UI-SMU-5719 | UI | SMU | Synthetic Mirage UI | 5719 | dream-like reflections, digital illusions, shifting textures | | UI-AFU-2613 | UI | AFU | Aurora Flow UI | 2613 | aurora borealis waves, northern light transitions, smooth gradient shifts | | UI-GFI-3627 | UI | GFI | Gravity Flux Interface | 3627 | distortion fields, pressure variations, anti-gravity panels | | UI-CHU-4518 | UI | CHU | Chimeric Hybrid UI | 4518 | fusion of biological and mechanical, evolving modular design | | UI-SSU-5312 | UI | SSU | Sonic Spectrum UI | 5312 | audio-driven visuals, soundwave buttons, rhythmic transitions | | UI-LEU-4729 | UI | LEU | Lunar Eclipse Interface | 4729 | contrasting shadow glow, celestial movement elements | | UI-NCU-2537 | UI | NCU | Neon Cathedral UI | 2537 | futuristic stained glass, divine neon reflections, ethereal temple-like layering | | UI-VAU-1635 | UI | VAU | Virtual Archive UI | 1635 | data libraries, holographic scrolls, glowing information nodes | | UI-CPU-2736 | UI | CPU | Cosmic Pulse UI | 2736 | planetary rings, energy pulsations, celestial breathing motion | | UI-EQU-5418 | UI | EQU | Eldritch Quantum UI | 5418 | forbidden tech, deep-space horror elements, mind-bending complexity | | UI-AIU-3629 | UI | AIU | Aether Infusion UI | 3629 | floating energy spheres, pure elemental essences, translucent overlays | | UI-RTU-4316 | UI | RTU | Rune-Tech UI | 4316 | ancient glyph-based technology, mystic holograms, woven inscriptions | | UI-IEU-5727 | UI | IEU | Inferno Eclipse UI | 5727 | ember glow, lava-motion panels, contrasting shadow flames | | UI-SVU-2634 | UI | SVU | Starlit Vortex UI | 2634 | spiraling galaxy motions, gravitational UI elements | | UI-PCC-1528 | UI | PCC | Prismatic Cyber-Core | 1528 | multi-light reflections, electric neon waves, refracted dimensions | | UI-ARU-2735 | UI | ARU | Adaptive Reality UI | 2735 | real-time environmental shifting panels, interactive dynamic redesign | | UI-CCU-4319 | UI | CCU | Crystal Cavern UI | 4319 | glowing crystal formations, refracted energy grids, luminous pathfinding | | UI-DRU-1627 | UI | DRU | Dimensional Rift UI | 1627 | portal integration, space-time fractals, layered energy waves |
This keeps Column A easy for copying while retaining the separated components for flexible reference or data usage.
